extraction.one_line_summary: VAN AERT won the uphill sprint after LAPORTE singlehandedly closed down CAVAGNA's late attack with 1km remaining.
tactical_patterns: LAPORTE neutralized CAVAGNA's dangerous late solo move alone, burning team asset but protecting VAN AERT's sprint setup.
KWIATKOWSKI led out HAYTER from reduced group, showing INEOS positioned second sprinter after climb selection occurred.
Jumbo-Visma avoided tempo work despite having leader jersey contender, letting Groenewegen's team chase break and tire sprinters.

rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: positive: won uphill sprint from reduced group despite no formal leadout train assembled
rider_signals.LAPORTE Christophe: positive: closed dangerous CAVAGNA attack solo with 1km left, critical defensive ride
rider_signals.HAYTER Ethan: positive: had KWIATKOWSKI leadout in reduced sprint, finished on podium despite summit not suiting pure sprinters
rider_signals.CAVAGNA Rémi: neutral: late attack at 1km showed aggression but insufficient gap before LAPORTE response
rider_signals.GROENEWEGEN Dylan: negative: team exhausted chasing break, eliminated on final categorized climb over 20km from finish
rider_signals.QUINN Sean: positive: young American finished top-six in reduced sprint without team support
